subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of the loved ones of God with supreme gladness in this springtime of sorrows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی الاعلی ان اذکر احباء الله بالفرح الاعظم فی ربیع الاحزان هذا ما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
